title: Safety plan documentation

red_flags.text: Supports recording that suicidal ideation, intent, support and immediate risk were directly assessed by a competent clinician; it does not populate a negative, assign risk, or generate escalation.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-completed self-harm and suicide risk assessment for self-harm safety planning; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports recording that suicidal ideation, intent, support and immediate risk were directly assessed by a competent clinician; it does not populate a negative, assign risk, or generate escalation.

source.title: Depression in adults: treatment and management — Recommendations

treatment_and_management.text: Supports recording the person’s needs, concerns, strengths, vulnerabilities, context and clinician-performed psychosocial assessment without using a prediction score.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports collaborative psychosocial assessment and care for self-harm safety planning; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports recording the person’s needs, concerns, strengths, vulnerabilities, context and clinician-performed psychosocial assessment without using a prediction score.

source.title: Self-harm: assessment, management and preventing recurrence

treatment_and_management.text: Supports recording safeguarding consideration and clinician-confirmed assessment, plan, communication and follow-up before discharge after self-harm.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports safeguarding and qualified discharge context for self-harm safety planning; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports recording safeguarding consideration and clinician-confirmed assessment, plan, communication and follow-up before discharge after self-harm.

source.title: Self-harm: assessment, management and preventing recurrence

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Triggers, warning signs, coping strategies, people and services, means safety, dependants, consent, crisis contacts, clinician risk formulation and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for self-harm safety planning.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
